evidences.title: Binance.US API Documentation: Introduction
evidences.content: Scheduled changes: The All Book Tickers stream (!bookTicker) is set to be removed in late November 2022. Please use the Individual Book Ticker Streams instead. (@bookTicker). Multiple @bookTicker streams can be subscribed to over one connection. For example: wss://stream.binance.us:9443/stream?streams=btcusdt@bookTicker/bnbbtc@bookTicker Market Data: Added a new optional parameter type in two endpoints: GET /api/v3/ticker and GET /api/v3/ticker/24hr. Also removed Individual Symbol Ticker Streams as it duplicates with Ticker Order Book Stream, supported new candlestick chart interval: 1s. Get Asset Distribution History endpoint: Updated this endpoint to also query the rebate distribution record.
